docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PETERSON, EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT QUACH, MUOI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
